data.name: label1.Text
data.value:
One morning in Pusheen City, something was wrong. In the center of town, where a glowing blue crystal usually floated above a small pedestal… there was nothing. The crystal was gone.
The tiny buildings stood quietly. “Cat Karaoke” was silent. Even the kittens in School stopped solving fish math. The crystal wasn’t just decoration. It powered the city lights at night and made the roads softly glow.
